title: The World Government’s Shadow
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Rocks D. Xebec, Robin, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The sky!!! it's splitting?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta get out of here or we're gonna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's steal a ship and get off this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Huh?! what about rocks' ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Dumbass, no one's going back!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The rocks pirates are history!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: hurry to the coast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Garp!! Can you repeat that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I said get every Survivor and marine you can aboard that ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And cast off immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Roger, what's going on over there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get underway the instant Rayleigh's group is aboard. Wait for me at sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll make it back for sure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Rocks and Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I came to this island to catch the pair of you, but look how things panned out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, all I wanted was to save shaky. Grab some treasure, and bail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wanna call a temporary trace?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't say I'm thrilled with that idea, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can't just leave him be!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Hey, rocks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This form...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THIS... CURSE!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
